author: APEX orchestrator (Claude Opus 4.7)
anchor_policy: Every claim cites either an audit JSON path, a filesystem read at a specified path, or a verbatim quote from shot_list.json / PROJECT_SPEC.md.

brand_tokens.style_anchor_quoted_verbatim: Pixar 3D animated feature film, vibrant warm colours, smooth stylized CGI, expressive character design
brand_tokens.prompt_rules_quoted_verbatim: Subject in first 15 words. 30-80 words per kontext_prompt. No quality tags. No negation. Lighting described as interaction. Texture inline with subject. Style anchor once at end. Character identified by key visual markers not 'the same character'.

agent_build.verified_safe_against_traversal: SLUG_RE=^[A-Z][A-Za-z0-9]{0,31}$ rejects path traversal; tested via --slug '../etc'

descriptor_block_quoted.prompt: A magical realm playground at sunset with weathered swings and a tall ornate carousel under red and orange evening summer sky, soft warm light catching painted wood, calm wide framing

magical_realm_playground_build.asset_truncation_note: Pack capped at PACK_MAX=7; 2 additional variants beyond the cap.
magical_realm_playground_build.downstream_use: ANIM-05 video agent reads ANIM-04-scene-pack-manifest.json:scenes.MagicalRealmPlayground.assets[] for first-shot Wan 2.2 i2v background references.

operator_gated_blockers: G10 from ANIM-01 handover: Supabase QC tracking schema migration — operator-gated, not executed in ANIM-04 (filesystem manifest + audit JSONs serve as the QC ledger for now).
